mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (document_id, user_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.document_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.name as userName, u.avatar as userAvatar, u.account as userAccount, CASE WHEN d.owner_id = c.user_id THEN 'OWNER' ELSE dc.permission END as permission FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id JOIN documents d ON c.document_id = d.id LEFT JOIN document_collaborators dc ON c.document_id = dc.document_id AND c.user_id = dc.user_id WHERE c.document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
